stract":"无系统，无女主，无圣母，无金手指，慢节奏，全靠主角阴。
天下武修分七境:武徒，武者，武师，武王，武宗，武圣，武帝。
以武入道，化凡为仙。
天道不公，视凡人为蝼蚁，天下武者皆以破凡而为，今日我莫青，就要以凡人之躯，斩仙人之首，正吾之名，扬我凡人之威。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o567c5732460eaa5a04ad55442d3a1b86~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大梦三千觉","author_id":"","book_id":"7281100147512052775","book_name":"凡武修仙传","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7281100272796074559","read_count":"20","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"375491"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"154","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,无女主,架空,东方玄幻,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o14800571d47232839b9b60733d413013~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779167822&x-signature=baJ%2FXr1pnFMgDskPDMEsBy4WpM8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"113964316626222","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.7221164e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320131702702FD844399332F56621"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"4","score_suffix_tex
